roa.docketEntryComment: PRVT/DEF MOT TO MODIFY PROBATION FILED

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:120 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  17  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TOTHE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON TUESDAY, MARCH 25, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OFHEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 65 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY ON THIS PETITION TO SERVETHE 120 COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:03-02-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:MOT TO MODIFY/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:FELONY PAROLE VIOLATION/
